description_long: This is a rustic rope suspension bridge anchored between two large, rugged stone outcrops. The bridge deck consists of uneven wooden planks, some of which are missing or loosely attached, creating a precarious walking surface. Thick ropes form the main support structure, looping over wooden posts at each end and connecting to the planks below. The posts are reinforced with additional rope wrappings and knots, adding to the hand-crafted, primitive appearance. The stone bases are irregular and naturalistic, suggesting the bridge is set in a rugged outdoor environment, such as a park or adventure area. The overall look is weathered and utilitarian, with a focus on function over ornamentation.
description: A rustic rope suspension bridge with uneven wooden planks, anchored between two large stone outcrops and supported by thick ropes and wooden posts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full span of the bridge, with both stone bases and the rope-supported wooden planks clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view from one end, highlighting the stone base and the entry point with wooden posts and rope wrappings.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the opposite stone base and the full bridge span with rope and plank details.
description_view_3: Side view from the other end, focusing on the stone base and the exit point with similar post and rope features.
attribute_railing_design: thick rope handrails with vertical rope supports, attached to wooden posts
